message:
fix: remove stale 'sync' from noDbCommands breaking sync subcommands (GH#2419)

The deprecated top-level bd sync was removed but its noDbCommands entry
remained. The leaf-name check matched "sync" against every sync
subcommand (federation sync, jira sync, etc.), causing them to skip
DB init and fail with "no store available".

Co-Authored-By: s070681 <s070681@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -351,7 +351,6 @@ var rootCmd = &cobra.Command{
 			"quickstart",
 			"resolve-conflicts",
 			"setup",
-			"sync", // deprecated no-op, prints message only
 			"version",
 			"zsh",
 		}
